subject: Re: Boeing 727 schedule
body:
yes

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

> Jeffrey,
> I would like to have Morrison comply with some
> routine  maintenance items on 
> Boeing in JFK if you  think the schedule Lesley
> presented to me stands firm. 
> B727 March 16, JFK - LSJ.
> The main item is autopilot control head, will fed ex
>  out Monday return  
> following Monday, March 13 at latest. 
> -replace copilots windshield
> -Repair shower (inop, water  leak).
> Please advise if this approved.
> Larry V.
>  
>

body_html:
yes

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

Jeffrey,
I would like to have Morrison comply with some
routine maintenance items on
Boeing in JFK if you think the schedule Lesley
presented to me stands firm.
B727 March 16, JFK - LSJ.
The main item is autopilot control head, will fed ex
out Monday return
following Monday, March 13 at latest.
-replace copilots windshield
-Repair shower (inop, water leak).
Please advise if this approved.
Larry V.
